purpose: Public risk-remediation plan for reviewers and community moderators. It maps the current Blockaid-style risk factors to published evidence, current status, and the real actions required before stronger public claims can be made.
scopeBoundary: This plan is a remediation tracker and evidence map. It is not a security-vendor approval, not a third-party audit, not an LP lock claim, not a reserve lock claim, and not a claim of deep liquidity.

blockaidRiskFactorsNoted: unlocked or insufficiently documented LP custody
reviewerContext.currentReviewerRequest: Blockaid requested an independent third-party audit report before reassessing the remaining risk indicators.

riskItems.label: Price Volatility
mitigationAlreadyPublished: Official market route is consistently documented as the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
Public pages disclose starter-depth liquidity, high price impact, and slippage risk.
Public materials prohibit price support, price stability, return, or deep-liquidity claims.
nextRiskReducingActions: Increase legitimate pool depth only when the owner intentionally funds both sides of the pool.
Publish exact transaction hashes and pool-position details for any future liquidity change.
Wait for organic public activity before tracked listing submissions.

riskItems.label: LP Custody
mitigationAlreadyPublished: Official liquidity statement records the GCA/USDT pool and starter-depth status.
Future LP lock evidence requirements are documented before any lock claim can be made.
nextRiskReducingActions: If the owner later chooses to lock LP, publish lock platform, lock address, position identifier, transaction hash, unlock date, and custody details.
Do not describe LP as locked until verifiable on-chain evidence exists.
strongerClaimRequires: verifiable LP lock or equivalent custody evidence

riskItems.label: Supply Concentration
mitigationAlreadyPublished: Holder distribution page states that concentration risk remains.
nextRiskReducingActions: Move reserve to Safe multisig, a lock contract, or a vesting contract if the owner wants stronger trust evidence.
Publish Safe, lock, or vesting addresses and transaction hashes if custody changes.
Keep circulating-supply wording conservative because data platforms may still show total supply as circulating.

riskItems.label: Third-party Audit
mitigationAlreadyPublished: Internal technical report is public for reviewer triage.
Public pages state that no third-party audit has been completed.
nextRiskReducingActions: Commission an independent audit only when budget, partner requirements, listing requirements, or liquidity scale justify it.
Publish the final report URL and exact auditor name only after the audit is complete.
Do not describe internal review as Certik, Hacken, Trail of Bits, or any other independent audit.

safeClaims: GCA has published a public risk-remediation plan.
The plan acknowledges price volatility, starter-depth liquidity, unlocked LP status, owner-controlled reserve concentration, and missing third-party audit as current risks.
The plan maps current public evidence to future risk-reducing actions.
No LP lock, reserve lock, deep liquidity, third-party audit, or security-vendor approval is claimed.
doNotClaim: LP is locked before verifiable lock evidence exists
reserve is locked before on-chain custody changes
deep liquidity or price stability before market data supports it
third-party audit completion before an independent report is published
security-vendor approval before a vendor confirms it
